name: Elanor's Sweet Potato Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat the eggs well.
2. Add sugar, salt, nutmeg, and lemon extract to the beaten eggs. Mix thoroughly.
3. Stir in evaporated milk until combined.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared pie shells.
5. Bake at 425°F for 20 minutes.
6. Reduce temperature to 325°F and bake for an additional 30-40 minutes, or until set.
